results.title: Minimum Password Length
results.description: Ensures users must create passwords of at least 14 characters.

results.title: Maximum Password Age
results.description: Passwords should expire within 365 days to limit exposure.

results.title: Account Lockout Threshold
results.description: Accounts should lock after 5 or fewer failed login attempts.

results.title: Account Lockout Duration
results.description: Locked accounts should remain locked for at least 15 minutes.

results.title: Guest Account Disabled
results.description: The built-in Guest account provides unauthenticated access and should be disabled.

results.title: Administrator Account Renamed
results.description: The built-in Administrator account (SID *-500) should be renamed to reduce attack surface.
results.remediation: Rename via: Local Users and Groups → Users → Right-click Administrator → Rename

results.title: Windows Firewall — Domain Profile
results.description: Firewall must be enabled for the Domain network profile.
results.remediation: Enable via: Windows Defender Firewall → Turn Windows Defender Firewall on

results.title: Windows Firewall — Private Profile
results.description: Firewall must be enabled for Private network profile.
results.remediation: Enable via: Windows Defender Firewall settings

results.title: Windows Firewall — Public Profile
results.description: Firewall must be enabled for Public network profile (most important — untrusted networks).
results.remediation: Enable via: Windows Defender Firewall settings

results.title: RDP Network Level Authentication
results.description: RDP connections must use NLA to verify user identity before a full session is established.
results.remediation: Enable NLA: System Properties → Remote → 'Allow connections only from computers running Remote Desktop with NLA'

results.title: RDP Disabled If Unused
results.description: Remote Desktop should be disabled if not actively needed.
results.expected_value: RDP Disabled (or enabled with NLA + firewall rules)
results.remediation: Disable RDP: System Properties → Remote → Uncheck 'Allow remote connections'

results.title: Automatic Windows Updates Enabled
results.description: Windows Update should be enabled to receive security patches automatically.
results.remediation: Enable via: Settings → Windows Update → Advanced options → Automatic updates

results.title: Windows Defender Real-Time Protection
results.description: Real-time antivirus protection should always be active.
results.remediation: Enable via: Windows Security → Virus & threat protection → Real-time protection

results.title: Audit Logon Events
results.description: Windows should log both successful and failed logon attempts.
results.remediation: Enable via: Local Security Policy → Audit Policy → Audit logon events

results.title: Audit Account Logon Events
results.description: Credential validation events should be logged.
results.remediation: Enable via: Local Security Policy → Advanced Audit Policy → Account Logon

results.title: Telnet Service Disabled
results.description: Telnet transmits data in plaintext — must be disabled.
results.remediation: Disable via: services.msc → find 'Telnet' → Properties → Startup type: Disabled

results.title: Remote Registry Disabled
results.description: Remote Registry allows remote editing of the registry.
results.remediation: Disable via: services.msc → find 'RemoteRegistry' → Properties → Startup type: Disabled

results.title: SNMP Service Disabled
results.remediation: Disable via: services.msc → find 'SNMP' → Properties → Startup type: Disabled
